name: Use Case 3: AI-Driven Tables, Figures, and Listings (TFL) Generation
title: CDISC Case 3 — ARS Reporting Event + ADaM to traceable TFLs
description: Execute a CDISC ARS v1.0 Reporting Event against ADaM datasets to produce Tables, Figures, Listings and Analysis Results Datasets (ARD) with end-to-end objective-to-result traceability. Standard safety outputs run through deterministic validated recipes; the AI drafts programs for the custom efficacy outputs; a human reviews before packaging. Artifacts land in /output.

steps.name: Provide inputs
steps.description: Upload an ARS v1.0 Reporting Event JSON and the ADaM datasets (CSV / Dataset-JSON / XPT). Leave empty to run on the bundled CDISCPILOT01 reference (ARS + ADaM).

steps.name: Stage inputs
steps.description: Deterministic. Resolve the Reporting Event + ADaM from the upload, or fall back to the bundled CDISCPILOT01 reference. Writes /workspace/reporting_event.json and /workspace/adam/.

steps.name: Generate TFLs from ARS
steps.description: AI. Bind the ARS to the ADaM; classify each Output as standard (recipe library covers it) or custom; run recipes / draft + repair programs -> cards/cardx ARD -> render. Writes /workspace/{ard,tfl,code,coverage.json,review.md}.

steps.name: Review drafted programs
steps.description: Review the draft TFLs and, for the custom efficacy outputs, the AI-drafted R. Approve to package, or revise to send the run back with feedback.

steps.name: Package TFLs + Traceability
steps.description: Deterministic. Coverage gate (every ARS Output -> a rendered file + an ARD); consolidate the ARD into one long-skinny ard.csv; write results back into the Reporting Event (Analysis.results[]); build traceability.html; write manifest.json. All to /output.
